_comment: Copy to cdk.context.json (gitignored) and edit. `thingNames` is the source of truth for how many Things the stack creates; the per-Thing-scoped IoT policy is shared across all of them.
_greengrass_token_exchange: By default the stack creates an IAM role + IoT role alias (TES) and adds iot:AssumeRoleWithCertificate to the device policy. Optional: set greengrassTokenExchangeRoleAlias to override the alias name (default sbcc-iot-hello-gg-tes). Set createGreengrassTokenExchangeRole to false only if you manage TES elsewhere; then set greengrassTokenExchangeRoleAlias if the external alias name should appear on the policy.
